name: RLS Limousine Svc
recent_news: No M&A or news identified. Operates under California CPUC TCP charter-party carrier authority as a limousine service in the Marina Del Rey / LAX corridor.
fit_notes: Not a school-bus operator. CPUC-licensed limousine/charter-party carrier with ~3 employees; no Type I/II school bus fleet, no district contracts, no special-needs school transport footprint identified. Not a fit for Summit tuck-in.

name: So Cal Medical Tranz-Ill

fit_notes: Not a school-bus operator. Appears to be a tiny NEMT (medical) van service, not student transportation. No school district contracts, no Type I/II buses, no SPED route business identified. Not a fit for Summit tuck-in.
